2281150.name: Zaoça: Šäaiks Lagush
2281150.description:
Zaoça: Šäaiks Lagûsh is an adventure/RPG that follows Jæl trying a new life in a seaside city. Use his local chemestry knowledge - that's not like ours - to help the local people to find what they need.

Talk with the people to know what they need and get quests to do. Do the tasks to get friendship. Raise the friendship level to get deeper in the Walvoy City story - and open harder quests!

Be useful to the citizens to get a permanent place in Walvoy. It will allow you to get even deeper to the city secrets!

Some game features:

  • Collect, mine, fish or cave around to get useful stuff. Use chemical solutions to transform elements to another kind. You may need the blacksmith oven to make some transformations - so it's better to be his friend!
  • The Jæl's cellphone have some useful apps, from calls and e-mails to social networks. Also, there's an app that will help you to understand all elements from Walvoy's nature. Just be careful not to get out of the service area...
  • Buy what you can't find locally on Jæl's favorite sites that sells raw materials - the citizens strangely just can't buy anything from there
  • Be kind and make friendship with the citizens and then you will be able to have a place to settle down permanently in the city. You will be also able to open a local commerce in the city, like a Jewelery or an Import House, once you get a permanent place in Walvoy.
  • There's a Game House in the city. Enjoy playing the games there - just be carefull not to lose all your money!
  • Zaoça [sounds like "Zaossa" - gentilic "Zaoch"] is a country in the Yorvh planet, and during the gameplay you will discover more about it and other countries as well. Some information will help you in your journey around Walvoy City.
  • Zaoça's culture is very rich too. As an example, you will be able to watch the matches from Zaoch National Selection at the Football World Cup along the people you want to improve the friendship, in places like the Bar, the Plaza or even at the Church! There are other events to attend along the citizens.
  • There are 20 characters at the game beginning to interact with. Get to know their stories and you will be surprised!

Sinopsis

Jæl's life is being transformed. Lasting few days to the new year come, he quitted his job as chemical employee in Fromazasse City and had no plans for the future, until his dad call him...

You will go along Jæl to Walvoy City, in the seaside of Zaoça, where his uncle and cousin live, and will meet a small town that have something strange in the air. May Jæl just stay for few months and go back home? Or there are more stuff to do in the city? Well, you will discover!

The chemical knowledge from Jæl may help various citizens there, and himself as well when getting goods from the city locations, like the beach and the mines. Also, there are an abandoned farm around there to explore around.

How much time it will take? Depends only on you!
2281150.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
